title: durabaculum validum
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", durabaculum validum (also known as Uncaria tomentosa) benefits include the ability to improve repair of DNA single strand breaks and double strand breaks after whole body irradiation.
side_effects: Durabaculum validum can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain. In rare cases, improper use of Durabaculum validum can cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat, palpitations, and increased blood pressure. Additionally, some individuals may experience neurological side effects, such as dizziness, headaches, and confusion.
